title: Radiant Pixel
description: Ce style capture l'essence nostalgique du pixel art numérique de l'ère 16 et 32 bits, caractérisé par des bords crénelés nets et des grappes de pixels carrés distincts. Il s'appuie sur un éclairage très contrasté et baigné de soleil, ainsi que sur une palette de couleurs limitées et soigneusement sélectionnées, plutôt que sur des dégradés fluides ou de l'anticrénelage. La profondeur est obtenue par une perspective atmosphérique saisissante, superposant des ombres chaudes et profondes à des arrière-plans vibrants et brillamment éclairés.
description_en: This style captures the nostalgic essence of 16-bit and 32-bit era digital pixel art, characterized by crisp, aliased edges and distinct square pixel clusters. It relies on high-contrast, sun-drenched lighting and a carefully curated limited color palette rather than smooth gradients or anti-aliasing. Depth is achieved through striking atmospheric perspective, layering deep warm shadows against vibrant, brilliantly lit backgrounds.
description_fr: Ce style capture l'essence nostalgique du pixel art numérique de l'ère 16 et 32 bits, caractérisé par des bords crénelés nets et des grappes de pixels carrés distincts. Il s'appuie sur un éclairage très contrasté et baigné de soleil, ainsi que sur une palette de couleurs limitées et soigneusement sélectionnées, plutôt que sur des dégradés fluides ou de l'anticrénelage. La profondeur est obtenue par une perspective atmosphérique saisissante, superposant des ombres chaudes et profondes à des arrière-plans vibrants et brillamment éclairés.
prompt: Digital hi-bit pixel art, reminiscent of 16-bit to 32-bit era retro gaming aesthetics, rendered with crisp, uniform square pixels and strict aliased edges without any anti-aliasing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, full bleed to all four corners, with no borders, no frames, and no white margins. Lighting is characterized by strong, directional, sun-drenched illumination that creates dramatic, high-contrast cast shadows across the environment. Employ a carefully curated, limited color palette heavily featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant hue, punctuated by brilliantly saturated {{accent_color}} in the brightly lit areas, and anchored by deep, warm {{secondary_color}} in the dense shadow regions. Avoid smooth gradients entirely; all shading and volumetric transitions must be executed through distinct, stepped color banding and meticulous organic pixel clusters. The tactile quality is dictated exclusively by the visible pixel grid, translating complex textures into abstracted, geometric pixel groupings. Light interacts with surfaces by forming luminous, blown-out highlight clusters that abruptly transition into flat, untextured shadow blocks. Subject silhouettes must exhibit the characteristic stair-stepped jaggedness inherent to classic pixel art. Establish deep spatial dynamics by contrasting heavily shadowed foreground layers against intensely illuminated background planes, simulating retro parallax depth. Tags: digital pixel art, 16-bit aesthetic, hi-bit, crisp aliased edges, stepped shading, sunlit high contrast, retro gaming style, pixel clusters, limited palette, no anti-aliasing, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Digital hi-bit pixel art, reminiscent of 16-bit to 32-bit era retro gaming aesthetics, rendered with crisp, uniform square pixels and strict aliased edges without any anti-aliasing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The scene is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Lighting is characterized by strong, directional, sun-drenched illumination that creates dramatic, high-contrast cast shadows across the environment. Employ a carefully curated, limited color palette heavily featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant hue, punctuated by brilliantly saturated {{accent_color}} in the brightly lit areas, and anchored by deep, warm {{secondary_color}} in the dense shadow regions. Avoid smooth gradients entirely; all shading and volumetric transitions must be executed through distinct, stepped color banding and meticulous organic pixel clusters. The tactile quality is dictated exclusively by the visible pixel grid, translating complex textures into abstracted, geometric pixel groupings. Light interacts with surfaces by forming luminous, blown-out highlight clusters that abruptly transition into flat, untextured shadow blocks. Subject silhouettes must exhibit the characteristic stair-stepped jaggedness inherent to classic pixel art, interacting distinctly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Intentional overflow is explicitly allowed where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame, cropped cleanly by the image boundaries. Tags: digital pixel art, 16-bit aesthetic, hi-bit, crisp aliased edges, stepped shading, sunlit high contrast, retro gaming style, pixel clusters, limited palette, no anti-aliasing
background_prompt: A serene, sun-drenched environment rendered in hi-bit pixel art, featuring deep atmospheric perspective and distinct foreground-to-background spatial layering. The scene is illuminated by strong, directional sunlight creating high-contrast lighting, where brilliant {{accent_color}} highlights contrast sharply against deep, warm {{secondary_color}} shadows. The landscape consists of abstracted geometric pixel clusters and uniform square pixels dominated by {{primary_color}}, with no smooth gradients or anti-aliasing. The sky or distant elements are bright and luminous, while the immediate foreground areas fall into heavy, flat shadow blocks, simulating classic 16-bit parallax scrolling depth.
background_prompt_removebg: A serene, sun-drenched environment rendered in hi-bit pixel art, featuring deep atmospheric perspective and distinct foreground-to-background spatial layering. The scene is illuminated by strong, directional sunlight creating high-contrast lighting, where brilliant {{accent_color}} highlights contrast sharply against deep, warm {{secondary_color}} shadows. The landscape consists of abstracted geometric pixel clusters and uniform square pixels dominated by {{primary_color}}, with no smooth gradients or anti-aliasing. The sky or distant elements are bright and luminous, while the immediate foreground areas fall into heavy, flat shadow blocks, simulating classic 16-bit parallax scrolling depth. In the foreground, a decorative, pixelated architectural or organic border frame overlays the scene, stepping down with jagged, aliased edges to transition seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. The high-contrast pixel clusters of the frame interact sharply with the {{background_color}} backdrop.
